name: Michele Scarpa
bio: Senior Full-stack Engineer with 10+ years of technical craftsmanship. Currently evolving from deep-code execution to architecting high-impact communities and engineering leadership.

experiences.label: CURRENT
experiences.description: Cloud infrastructure development on AWS using Terraform. Advanced performance testing with k6 framework. Full integration of voice chatbots based on OpenAI APIs to improve B2C experience and processes.

experiences.label: AI AUTOMATION
experiences.description: Application developed entirely with an 'agentic' approach, actively leveraging Claude Code to auto-generate and execute complex nutritional diet calculation logic for veterinary use.

coreAreas.title: Web & Mobile Ecosystems
coreAreas.description: Architecting cross-platform interfaces with focus on performance, state management, and seamless UX across the stack.

coreAreas.title: Enterprise GIS Context
coreAreas.description: Translating spatial data into actionable intelligence. Specialist in high-load geospatial infrastructure and map rendering.

coreAreas.title: AI & Conversational UX
coreAreas.description: Integrating LLMs into business workflows. Building robust RAG systems and context-aware chatbot orchestration.
